title: BlurOnly
description: the OG motion blur for vanilla and vulkan.
body:
adds motion blur to minecraft so camera movement looks smoother. 
Works on normal fabric/opengl and with vulkanmod if you use that it picks the correct one automatically.

## why i made this

I always liked playing with the OG [motion blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/motionblur), but it got discontinued and doesnt work with vulkan, there basically wasnt any motion blur that worked with it at all and the ones that did were just not the same, like didnt give me the same smoothness.

so i made bluronly. One mod that works whether youre on opengl or vulkanmod, runs on current versions.

## how to use

- `/motionblur` shows your current %
- `/motionblur 50` set the blur from 0 to 100 (`0` = off)

Config saves automatically.

I also included small optimization so It wont work when your menus.

## requirements

- **fabric api** required
- **Onlylib** recommended (For future updates)
- **vulkanmod** optional
